attacking_style: Does not rely on early attacks; clinches victory through final-stage ITT performance after staying close in GC through mountain stages.
team_tactics: Operated with low-domestique support profile, flying under radar as team workhorse before emerging as protected GC leader late in race.
terrain_preference: Time trials are decisive weapon; capable of defending on mountain stages without showing clear dominance, then exploiting ITT to overturn deficits.
vulnerability: Starting without clear team protection or protected status may limit ability to respond to early attacks in summit finishes if marked from stage 1.
key_patterns: Late-race form progression; enters as domestique but peaks in final week.
ITT specialist capable of overturning 39-second deficit on final day decisive time trial.
Stealth GC progression avoiding early detection until threatening position becomes apparent.
form_trajectory: positive: Demonstrated classic crescendo pattern peaking in week 3, winning Giro after starting as domestique with modest GC pedigree
